last_report:
### CANCELLED — Toronto Raptors ML
- Reason: Odds fell below ML commit confirmation floor. Scout drafted at 1.63; current odds 1.60. Skills file sets ML commit floor at 1.65 (Scout floor 1.70 minus 0.05 drift allowance). 1.60 < 1.65 — outside valid range at commit time. Cancel criterion: "Odds fell outside valid range for market type."
- Odds at cancel: 1.60 (was 1.63 at Scout time)

---

### CONFIRMED — Chicago Bulls -6.5
- Match: Washington Wizards vs Chicago Bulls | Tip: 2026-04-09T23:00Z
- Pick: Chicago Bulls -6.5 | Scout odds: 2.0 | Commit odds: 1.96 | Move: -0.04 (minor, within threshold)
- ML: Washington 3.17 / Chicago 1.42 | ATS: Washington +6.5 (1.96/1.96) | O/U: 248.5 (O:1.96/U:1.96)
- Stake: €171.00 | Pot: €335.16 | Conf: 68/100 | EV: +33.3%
- Decision: Odds drifted only -0.04 against Scout price, remaining well within spread target range (1.96 vs floor 1.75). EV recalculated at 1.96 = +33.3%, massive edge. Washington is 17-62, L10 1-9, confirmed tank-tier team. Official injury report confirms Washington missing Coulibaly (Bursitis), Anthony Davis (Left Finger), Kyshawn George (Left Elbow). Chicago anchor players Coby White, Nikola Vucevic, Patrick Williams all healthy. L15 NetRtg gap of 6.7 points (WAS -39.5 vs CHI -32.8) exceeds the 6-point threshold for strong spread signals. Tank team as large underdog — consistent with skills file spread rules. Confidence 68 meets spread confidence floor of 60.

---

### CANCELLED — Houston Rockets ML
- Reason: Odds collapsed from 1.60 (Scout) to 1.43 (commit) — a -0.17 move driven by Joel Embiid confirmed OUT (NBA official injury report). Odds now well below ML commit floor of 1.65. EV at 1.43 = +0.1%, below the 0.05 minimum. Cancel criteria: "Odds fell outside valid range for market type" AND "EV recalculated at current odds falls below 0.05."
- Odds at cancel: 1.43 (was 1.60 at Scout time)
- Note: Embiid's absence creates a separate spread edge captured via late scout.

---

### CONFIRMED (LATE SCOUT) — Houston Rockets -6.5
- Match: Houston Rockets vs Philadelphia 76ers | Tip: 2026-04-10T00:00Z
- Pick: Houston Rockets -6.5 | Scout odds: N/A (new pick) | Commit odds: 1.98 | Move: N/A
- ML: Houston 1.43 / Philadelphia 3.10 | ATS: Houston -6.5 (1.98/1.94) | O/U: 226.5 (O:1.96/U:1.96)
- Stake: €228.00 | Pot: €451.44 | Conf: 72/100 | EV: +42.6%
- Decision: Joel Embiid confirmed OUT (Illness) per NBA official report — discovered post-14:00 Scout. This is exactly the late_scout_trigger: "Star ruled out in last 2-3 hours and books haven't fully adjusted [on spread]." Embiid's absence cripples PHI's offense on the road; PHI also missing Broome and Payne. Houston is home (50-29, L10 8-2), L15 NetRtg +39.9 vs PHI L15 +4.9 (35-point gap). Houston anchor players all available. PHI season NetRtg -0.4 worsens substantially without Embiid. Spread 1.98 within valid range (1.80–2.30). EV = +42.6% well above 0.05 minimum. All gates met: time (86 min), quantity (1 new pick), confidence (72 ≥ 60), EV (42.6% ≥ 5%), odds (1.98 in range). Stake: High tier (70-84) = 20% × €1139 = €228.

---

### EXPOSURE SUMMARY
- Total committed: €171 + €228 = €399.00
- Bankroll: €1,139.00 | 70% cap: €797.30
- Exposure: 35.0% of bankroll — well within limits ✓

---

**Slate Summary:** Two bets committed for a total of €399 (35% of bankroll). The Chicago -6.5 spread against tank-tier Washington remains the most reliable bet on the slate — a confirmed full-depletion scenario against a marginally functional Bulls squad with a strong NetRtg gap. The late-breaking Embiid OUT news created a superior spread vehicle (Houston -6.5 at 1.98) versus the original Houston ML that collapsed to 1.43; this late pick captures the same directional edge at better odds with outstanding EV. Toronto ML was reluctantly cancelled due to the 0.03 unfavorable drift below the mandatory 1.65 commit floor — the underlying thesis remains sound but rules must be followed precisely.

settled_bets.match: Atlanta Hawks vs New York Knicks

Core thesis intact: NYK season NetRtg +6.6 vs ATL +2.6 (4.0-pt gap in NYK's favour). ATL L10 hot streak fade signal valid (8-2 L10 but 45-33 season record vs NYK 50-28). NYK better season record, better NetRtg, healthy franchise players. ATL's surge (L15 +36.6) flagged but regression-fade at 2.00 still strong value. Stake maintained at €150 (15% — conservative within High tier due to ATL home court and L15 surge counter-signal).

settled_bets.match: Denver Nuggets vs Portland Trail Blazers
settled_bets.reasoning: COMMIT REVIEW — CONFIRMED at current line. Scout drafted DEN -8.5 at 1.94. Current market: DEN -8.0 at 1.95. Counter-signal noted: POR L15 +46.2 is anomalously high but roster tonight is severely depleted — L15 figure does not reflect tonight's deployment. At -8.0 (easier cover than -8.5), the pick retains strong value. EV = (0.68 × 1.95) - 1 = 0.326. Spread odds 1.95 within target (1.80-2.30). Confidence 68 (Medium tier) unchanged. Stake €150 maintained.

LATE PICK — ADDED AT COMMIT. Scout noted this game and drafted SAS -8.5 at 1.90 but it was not included in final draft picks for commit review. Re-evaluated at commit time. TIME GATE: Game at 00:00 UTC, commit at 22:27 UTC = 93 min > 20 min ✅. ODDS GATE: SAS -8.5 at 1.89. Within spread target 1.80-2.30 ✅. QUANTITY GATE: First and only new pick at commit phase ✅. LINE MOVEMENT: Scout had 1.90, now 1.89 — movement of -0.01, negligible. INJURY CHECK (NBA Official): SAS injury report shows only Harrison Ingram Out (G League), David Jones Garcia Out (ankle surgery), Emanuel Miller Out (G League) — no franchise-level absences. PHI: Johni Broome Out (recovery), Cameron Payne Out (strain) — no franchise-level absences. SAS anchor players (Wembanyama, Castle, Vassell) not listed = active. THESIS: SAS L15 +48.9 (elite, top of entire league). Season NetRtg +8.2 vs PHI -0.2 = 8.4-pt gap. SAS record 59-19 vs PHI 43-35. SAS L10 9-1 vs PHI 6-4. SAS home at Frost Bank Center. PHI L15 +11.9 is decent but SAS form is genuinely elite — record validates this is not a misleading hot streak on a mediocre team (59-19 is a top-tier record). CONFIDENCE: Base 65 (SAS clearly superior team, home, elite form) + 5 (PHI depleted: Broome, Payne out) = 70. EV = (0.70 × 1.89) - 1 = 1.323 - 1 = 0.323 ≥ 0.05 ✅. STAKE: Confidence 70 = High tier (70-84) = 20-25% of €1,000. Use 20% = €200. Total committed stake after all picks: €150 + €150 + €200 = €500 = 50% of bankroll ≤ 70% ✅.

settled_bets.match: Los Angeles Lakers vs Oklahoma City Thunder
settled_bets.reasoning: Late-breaking trigger: LeBron James confirmed OUT (Management) at commit time — was Questionable/GTD at Scout. Combined with Luka Doncic OUT, Austin Reaves OUT, Marcus Smart OUT, the Lakers are playing with a skeleton roster of reserves. OKC (62-16) has SGA healthy and a full squad minus Jalen Williams — still elite. OKC L15 NetRtg: +48.0 vs LAL L15: +3.8 — gap of +44.2. Line moved from +16.5 to +18.5 as LeBron OUT was confirmed; movement is fully explained by the injury news. OKC -18.5 at 1.92 represents genuine value against a decimated opponent. EV = (0.62 × 1.92) - 1 = 0.1904.

LATE SCOUT PICK — NEW EDGE SINCE 14:00. STEP 0 — LINE ANOMALY CHECK: PHX ML 1.16 (outside range), DAL ML 6.39 (outside range). PHX spread -12.5 at 1.99 is within valid spread range (1.75-2.30). No anomaly on spread line. STEP 1 — INJURY TRIGGER: Since Scout, official injury report confirms DAL missing: Kyrie Irving OUT (Left Knee Surgery — franchise player), Dereck Lively II OUT (Right Foot Surgery — key big), plus Klay Thompson Doubtful (Rest), Caleb Martin Doubtful (Strain), Naji Marshall Doubtful (Hip), Daniel Gafford Doubtful (Impingement). DAL is operating with a skeleton crew — essentially no reliable rotation. STEP 2 — NETRTG ANALYSIS: PHX L15 +8.6 vs DAL L15 -29.3 — gap of 37.9 points. Season NetRtg: PHX +1.4 vs DAL -5.6. PHX trending upward; DAL in a steep decline with a depleted roster. STEP 3 — FORM: PHX L10 4-6 is a cold stretch concern (Scout previously flagged this), but the absence of virtually all DAL key players overrides form concerns for spread purposes. DAL L10 2-8. STEP 4 — PHX KEY PLAYERS: Kevin Durant and Devin Booker NOT on injury report (active). Grayson Allen Questionable (Contusion — role player, not franchise, standard -5% stake adjustment not required). Mark Williams OUT and Highsmith OUT (Management — not key to PHX spread). PHX core intact. STEP 5 — SPREAD EVALUATION: PHX -12.5 at home. With DAL missing Kyrie (their best player) and multiple other key contributors Doubtful/Out, a 12.5-pt home win is achievable for PHX. PHX season NetRtg advantage (+1.4 vs -5.6 = 7.0 pts season), L15 gap (+37.9 pts), and home court (~3 pts) support the spread. STEP 6 — CONFIDENCE: Base 65 (strong matchup edge with depleted DAL), -3 for PHX L10 cold form concern = 62. EV = (0.62 × 1.99) - 1 = 1.2338 - 1 = 0.234. STEP 7 — ODDS VALIDATION: 1.99 within spread range (1.75-2.30). EV 0.234 >> 0.05 threshold. STEP 8 — STAKING: Confidence 62 = Medium tier (15-20%). 15% of €1,339 = €200.85, rounded to €200. Total exposure: 14.9% of bankroll — well within 70% limit. Late scout quantity gate: this is pick 1 of max 1 allowed.

rejected_games.reason: BOS ML at 2.65 is above 2.50 target ceiling. NYK ML at 1.55 below 1.60 floor. No side falls in 1.60-2.50 ML range. Spread NYK -4.5: Multiple Celtics questionable (J. Brown, D. White, Hauser, Queta) — GTD status creates injury uncertainty. NYK L15 +8.1 vs BOS L15 +34.6 — Boston's L15 is dominant (gap 26.5). Season NetRtg gap: BOS +8.2 vs NYK +6.6 = only 1.6 gap. BOS L15 massively favors Boston but odds out of range for BOS ML. Spread requires confidence ≥ 60 with clean injury data — too many questionable players on BOS to commit to NYK -4.5 spread. No valid pick meets all criteria.

Indiana Pacers: Tyrese Haliburton OUT (franchise player/key star), Andrew Nembhard OUT, T.J. McConnell OUT, Aaron Nesmith OUT — severely depleted. Franchise player rule: Haliburton OUT means do NOT bet IND ML without opponent also missing a star. Brooklyn Nets: Nic Claxton OUT but otherwise intact. BKN ML at 2.42 in range but Brooklyn is confirmed tanking team (17-52, L10: 3-7, NetRtg -9.6). IND L15 -9.0 with Haliburton presumably missing. Both teams severely compromised. No clean edge on either side.

rejected_games.reason: LAL: Luka Doncic OUT (confirmed NBA official PDF), Austin Reaves OUT [roster-only — verify], Jaxson Hayes OUT, Marcus Smart OUT. Both teams compromised, GS odds below target, LAL requires franchise player re-verification. No clean pick. Flag: at commit phase, if Curry confirmed OUT, GS becomes weaker; if LAL absences confirmed, LAL +2.60 could be explored but franchise player rule requires official confirmation first.

scout_report_data.report: NBA Official injury PDF available for all 12 playing teams tonight — full confidence rules apply. Pace data present (non-zero) so O/U pace signals available in principle, though no totals met the 65+ confidence floor this session. Three picks drafted: Toronto ML (dominant L15 edge +23.2 vs Miami's -8.6, confirmed cold fade candidate L10 3-7), Chicago Bulls -6.5 spread vs fully-tanking Washington (L15 gap 6.7, tanker cover rate rule triggered, EV +36%), and Houston Rockets ML vs Philadelphia (L15 gap +35.0, PHI negative NetRtg fade signal, HOU W7 streak). A fourth pick (HOU ML at 1.60) is marginal — flagged for commit re-verification as odds sit at the exact 1.60 floor. LAL/GS deferred pending franchise player confirmation at commit phase.
